titles.title: As the Deer Pants for the Water

authors.author: Martin J. Nystrom
Martin J. Nystrom
Wie ein Hirsch lechzt nach frischem Wasser

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: As the deer pants for the water, So my soul longs after You. You alone are my heart's desire And I long to worship You.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You alone are my strength my shield. To You alone may my spirit yield. You alone are my heart's desire And I long to worship You.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You're my friend and you are my brother, Even though You are a King. I love you more than any other, So much more than anything.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I want You more than gold or silver, Only You can satisfy. You alone are the real joy-giver And the apple of my eye.
